title: Rosario, Santa Fe — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rosario, Santa Fe: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rosario is a city in Santa Fe with a population of 1,325,090. Santa Fe’s largest city on the Paraná River, birthplace of Che Guevara and Lionel Messi.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
